item.title: Bereishis - Always Moving Forward
item.dc:creator: Yisroel Yudkowsky
item.description:
5 minute Dvar Torah to say at the Shabbos table, by Rabbi Dovid Orlofsky.

~~~

Sponsored in honor of my mother's 94th BD (24 Elul) and in Memory of my beloved father, יוסף בן אלימלך, who had finished writing his Sefer Torah (which took 22.5 years) at about this time (5 years ago).

Sponsored by the Torah Sweets, a popular weekly newsletter that is read by thousands weekly. Subscribe for free by emailing torahsweets@gmail.com (one word) and transform your Shabbos Table!

🤗 Sponsorship opportunities: https://rabbiorlofsky.com/sponsor
